findings.observation: PID 5678 (powershell.exe) appears in psscan output but is absent from pslist active process listing.
findings.interpretation: Possible hidden or terminated process artifact — requires corroboration with other plugins before concluding malicious activity.

tool_provenance.command: vol.py -f mem.raw windows.psscan; vol.py -f mem.raw windows.pslist

findings.observation: Process 1234 is malicious C2 beacon communicating with attacker infrastructure
